# We Help Automate (WeHA)

> Compliance-grade AI automation for SMBs. WeHA turns messy, time-consuming manual
> workflows into reliable, documented, auditable systems — built in days, not months.
> Operating across the UAE (Dubai), Australia and Singapore.

## About

- Founder background: a decade in cybersecurity / stopping breaches, so every
  automation is built with IAM-grade data permissions and full auditability.
- Compliant with UAE PDPL, the Australia Privacy Act, and Singapore PDPA.
- No black-box automations — every system is documented and owned by the client.

## Services

- Lead capture & qualification automation (WhatsApp + email + CRM).
- Workflow & document automation (n8n / Make + Claude + your existing tools).
- Custom AI systems mapped to one workflow at a time.

## Verticals

- Real Estate, Freight Forwarding, Accounting Firms, Mortgage & Finance,
  Events & Exhibitions, Fintech.
